  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.loadbalancer used by org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.client.loadbalancer
    Class
    Description
    ConditionalOnKubernetesLoadBalancerEnabled
    Provides a more succinct conditional spring.cloud.kubernetes.loadbalancer.enabled.
    KubernetesLoadBalancerProperties
    Kubernetes load balancer client properties.
    KubernetesServiceInstanceMapper
     
    KubernetesServicesListSupplier
    Implementation of ServiceInstanceListSupplier for load balancer in SERVICE mode.

    KubernetesLoadBalancerMode
